steps.title: Identify the Core Signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that the CNN model's predictions aligned with prior research measurements—explicitly presented by Melis et al. as evidence (“one of several indications”) that the model accurately captures biomechanical processes.

steps.title: Match the Purpose
steps.content: Choice A directly states the passage's purpose: to present evidence supporting the CNN model's effectiveness, precisely what the alignment data achieves. The other three all miss the point—B fabricates a refinement process not shown, C mischaracterizes the comparison as between models rather than between model predictions and measurements, and D treats the model as needing justification when the passage validates it. That matches choice A — A is correct.
